name: Edging Enchantment
description: By wearing the Cock Ring of Edging you gives you a chance to edge instead of orgasm, the chance to edge is (50 + 0.5*power + 0.5*willpower)%. When you cum, you lose an extra spirit if your arousal is 1.5x your max arousal or more, and you will cum if you reach triple your max arousal for 3 spirit. When you edge, you have a chance of getting stunned equal to (90 - power - will - luck*0.5 - stun res)%.
